mnemonics: Willy's Algorithm Saves All Roads - Warshall's Algorithm
Father Floyd's Algorithm Stops All Light - Floyd's Algorithm
keyPoints: Warshall's Algorithm: Transposes the graph, then updates distances between nodes
Floyd's Algorithm: For each node, finds the shortest path between nodes
Dynamic Programming: Breaks down complex problems into smaller subproblems
Memos: Stores previously computed values to avoid redundant calculations
